reason: The remediation only edits NTP/Chrony configuration files to add or modify the maxpoll directive. This change does not affect authentication, boot loader, or critical system services and is unlikely to lock out access. Restarting the time service is sufficient to apply the change.
estimated_impact: networking affected; filesystems affected; Improper maxpoll value could cause time sync delays; Mis‑syntax in config file could prevent NTP/Chrony from starting
